message.content:
@startuml
skinparam classAttributeIconSize 0
skinparam classFontStyle italic
skinparam classFontName Arial
skinparam classFontSize 14
skinparam classBackgroundColor #F5F5F5
skinparam classBorderColor #333333
skinparam classBorderThickness 1
skinparam classPadding 10
skinparam classMargin 10
skinparam classStereotypeStyle none
skinparam classStereotypeFontStyle normal
skinparam classStereotypeFontName Arial
skinparam classStereotypeFontSize 12
skinparam classStereotypeColor #000000
skinparam classStereotypeBackgroundColor #FFFFFF
skinparam classStereotypeBorderColor #000000
skinparam classStereotypeBorderThickness 1
skinparam classStereotypePadding 5
skinparam classStereotypeMargin 5
skinparam classStereotypeAlignment center
skinparam classStereotypeVerticalAlignment middle
skinparam classStereotypeHorizontalAlignment center
skinparam classStereotypeTextAlignment center
skinparam classStereotypeTextVerticalAlignment middle
skinparam classStereotypeTextHorizontalAlignment center
skinparam classStereotypeTextPadding 5
skinparam classStereotypeTextMargin 5
skinparam classStereotypeTextFontStyle normal
skinparam classStereotypeTextFontName Arial
skinparam classStereotypeTextFontSize 12
skinparam classStereotypeTextColor #000000
skinparam classStereotypeTextBackgroundColor #FFFFFF
skinparam classStereotypeTextBorderColor #000000
skinparam classStereotypeTextBorderThickness 1
skinparam classStereotypeTextPadding 5
skinparam classStereotypeTextMargin 5
skinparam classStereotypeTextAlignment center
skinparam classStereotypeTextVerticalAlignment middle
skinparam classStereotypeTextHorizontalAlignment center
skinparam classStereotypeTextFontStyle normal
skinparam classStereotypeTextFontName Arial
skinparam classStereotypeTextFontSize 12
skinparam classStereotypeTextColor #000000
skinparam classStereotypeTextBackgroundColor #FFFFFF
skinparam classStereotypeTextBorderColor #000000
skinparam classStereotypeTextBorderThickness 1
skinparam classStereotypeTextPadding 5
skinparam classStereotypeTextMargin 5
skinparam classStereotypeTextAlignment center
skinparam classStereotypeTextVerticalAlignment middle
skinparam classStereotypeTextHorizontalAlignment center

class "MetadataInterpolatorSupport" as A {
    it.tidalwave.northernwind.frontend.media.impl.interpolator
}

class "XmpDcTitleInterpolator" as C {
    it.tidalwave.northernwind.frontend.media.impl.interpolator
    + interpolate(String, Context): String
}

A <|-- C

note bottom of C
    UMLDoclet 2.0.12, PlantUML 1.2020.16
end note

@enduml
